title: God's Anger Without Affection.
content:
God when He's angry here with anyone,
    His wrath is free from perturbation;
    And when we think His looks are sour and grim,
    The alteration is in us, not Him.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Anger Without Affection.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
